queryList.1: hp_slave: select config_key, config_value from hp_sys_app_config where config_key = 'SM_NEW_PERSON_POP_APART_DAY' limit 1
queryList.2: hp_master: SELECT order_num FROM hp_user_shop_order_num WHERE user_id = 1398717076 AND shop_id = 1314 AND add_source in (0,1) AND is_del = 0 and order_num > 0 limit 1
queryList.3: hp_master: select * from shop where shop_id = 1314
